message:
feat(codegen): Add auto-close bracket helpers to NativeCodegen

Add callback-based helpers that guarantee bracket matching:

Basic auto-close:
- withParens/withParensCtx: ( ... )
- withBraces/withBracesCtx: { ... }
- withBrackets/withBracketsCtx: [ ... ]
- withStructLit/withStructLitCtx: .{ ... }

Convenience helpers for common patterns:
- emitParens(expr): wrap single expression in parens
- emitBinOp(left, op, right): (left op right)
- emitCall/emitCallCtx: name(...)
- emitIfExpr: if (cond) then else else
- emitTry/emitOrelse/emitCatch: error handling
- emitSlice/emitSubscript: indexing
- emitField: value.field
- emitExprList: comma-separated expressions

These helpers make it impossible to forget closing brackets,
which is the key goal of the ZigBuilder migration.
